sentences.sentence: Travelling around Thailand in the 1990s, William Janssen was impressed with the basic rooftop solar heating systems that were on many homes, where energy from the sun was absorbed by a plate and then used to heat water for domestic use.
sentences.translation: 20 世纪 90 年代在泰国旅行时，William Janssen 对许多家庭屋顶上那种基础太阳能热水系统印象深刻：太阳能被一块板吸收，然后用来加热生活用水。

structure.text: was impressed with the basic rooftop solar heating systems
where energy from the sun was absorbed by a plate and then used to heat water for domestic use

difficult_points: Travelling around Thailand in the 1990s 是现在分词短语，交代 Janssen 产生印象的背景。
that were on many homes 修饰 solar heating systems，说明这些系统安装在许多家庭的屋顶上。
where 引导的关系从句说明这些系统的工作方式，where 指代前面的 systems。
was absorbed 和 used 都是被动结构，共同描述太阳能被吸收并被用于加热水。

sentences.sentence: Two decades later Janssen developed that basic idea he saw in Southeast Asia into a portable device that uses the power from the sun to purify water.
sentences.translation: 二十年后，Janssen 将他在东南亚看到的那个基本想法发展成了一种便携式设备，这种设备利用太阳的能量来净化水。

structure.text: developed that basic idea he saw in Southeast Asia into a portable device
that uses the power from the sun to purify water

difficult_points: developed ... into ... 表示“把……发展成……”，核心动作是 idea 到 device 的转化。
he saw in Southeast Asia 是省略关系代词的定语从句，修饰 that basic idea。
that uses the power from the sun to purify water 修饰 a portable device，说明设备的功能。

sentences.sentence: The Desolenator operates as a mobile desalination unit that can take water from different places, such as the sea, rivers, boreholes and rain, and purify it for human consumption.
sentences.translation: Desolenator 是一种移动式海水淡化装置，可以从海洋、河流、钻孔井和雨水等不同来源取水，并将其净化为可供人类饮用的水。

structure.text: operates as a mobile desalination unit
that can take water from different places
such as the sea, rivers, boreholes and rain
and purify it for human consumption

difficult_points: operates as 表示“作为……运作”，说明设备的性质而不是临时动作。
that 引导定语从句修饰 unit，take 和 purify 是该从句中的并列动作。
it 指代 water，for human consumption 表示净化后的用途是供人类消费或饮用。

sentences.sentence: It is particularly valuable in regions where natural groundwater reserves have been polluted, or where seawater is the only water source available.
sentences.translation: 在天然地下水储备已被污染，或海水是唯一可用水源的地区，它尤其有价值。

structure.text: where natural groundwater reserves have been polluted
or where seawater is the only water source available

difficult_points: It 指代上一句的 The Desolenator。
两个 where 从句并列修饰 regions，分别说明设备有价值的两类地区。
have been polluted 是现在完成时的被动语态，强调地下水已经遭到污染并影响现在。

sentences.sentence: Janssen saw that there was a need for a sustainable way to clean water in both the developing and the developed countries when he moved to the United Arab Emirates and saw large-scale water processing.
sentences.translation: 当 Janssen 搬到阿拉伯联合酋长国并看到大规模水处理时，他意识到发展中国家和发达国家都需要一种可持续的净水方式。

structure.text: that there was a need for a sustainable way to clean water in both the developing and the developed countries
when he moved to the United Arab Emirates and saw large-scale water processing

difficult_points: saw 后接 that 从句，含义是“意识到、看出”，不是字面上的“看见”。
there was a need for ... 是存在句结构，说明需求的存在。
both the developing and the developed countries 把发展中国家和发达国家都纳入范围。
when 引导时间状语从句，moved 和 saw 是其中的并列动作。

sentences.sentence: 'I was confronted with the enormous carbon footprint that the Gulf nations have because of all of the desalination that they do,' he says.
sentences.translation: 他说：“我面对的是海湾国家因进行大量海水淡化而产生的巨大碳足迹。”

structure.text: was confronted with the enormous carbon footprint
because of all of the desalination that they do

difficult_points: be confronted with 表示“面对、遭遇”，这里指意识到碳足迹的严重性。
that the Gulf nations have 修饰 carbon footprint，说明这个碳足迹属于海湾国家。
because of 后接名词短语，all of the desalination that they do 解释碳足迹巨大的原因。

sentences.sentence: The Desolenator can produce 15 litres of drinking water per day, enough to sustain a family for cooking and drinking.
sentences.translation: Desolenator 每天可以生产 15 升饮用水，足以维持一个家庭做饭和饮用的需要。

structure.text: can produce 15 litres of drinking water per day
enough to sustain a family for cooking and drinking

difficult_points: enough to sustain ... 是后置补充说明，评价 15 升饮用水的数量是否足够。
for cooking and drinking 说明 sustain a family 的具体需求场景。
can produce 表示设备能力，而不是一次性生产行为。

sentences.sentence: Its main selling point is that unlike standard desalination techniques, it doesn't require a generated power supply: just sunlight.
sentences.translation: 它的主要卖点在于，与标准海水淡化技术不同，它不需要发电供能，只需要阳光。

structure.text: that unlike standard desalination techniques, it doesn't require a generated power supply: just sunlight
it doesn't require a generated power supply

difficult_points: that 引导表语从句，解释 main selling point 的具体内容。
unlike standard desalination techniques 是对比短语，突出该设备与常规技术不同。
冒号后的 just sunlight 省略了 it requires，强调只需要阳光。

sentences.sentence: It measures 120 cm by 90 cm, and is easy to transport, thanks to its two wheels.
sentences.translation: 它的尺寸为 120 厘米乘 90 厘米，并且由于有两个轮子，运输起来很方便。
difficult_points: measures 在这里表示“尺寸为”，不是“测量”。
and is easy to transport 与 measures 并列，共用主语 It。
thanks to 引出原因，说明设备便于运输是因为有两个轮子。

sentences.sentence: Water enters through a pipe, and flows as a thin film between a sheet of double glazing and the surface of a solar panel, where it is heated by the sun.
sentences.translation: 水通过管道进入，然后以一层薄膜的形式在一块双层玻璃和太阳能板表面之间流动，并在那里被太阳加热。

structure.text: and flows as a thin film between a sheet of double glazing and the surface of a solar panel
where it is heated by the sun

difficult_points: enters 和 flows 是并列谓语，共同描述水在设备中的流动过程。
as a thin film 表示水流动时呈现的形态。
where 引导非限制性关系从句，指代前面的空间位置，即玻璃与太阳能板表面之间。
is heated by the sun 是被动语态，说明加热来源是太阳。

sentences.sentence: The warm water flows into a small boiler (heated by a solar-powered battery) where it is converted to steam.
sentences.translation: 温水流入一个小锅炉（由太阳能电池加热），并在那里转化为蒸汽。

structure.text: where it is converted to steam

difficult_points: 括号中的 heated by a solar-powered battery 是过去分词短语，补充说明 boiler 的加热方式。
where 引导关系从句，where 指代 a small boiler。
it 指代 The warm water，is converted to steam 是被动语态，表示水被转化为蒸汽。

sentences.sentence: When the steam cools, it becomes distilled water.
sentences.translation: 当蒸汽冷却后，它就变成蒸馏水。
difficult_points: When 引导时间状语从句，说明蒸汽变成蒸馏水的条件或时点。
it 指代 the steam，而不是整套设备。
becomes 表示状态变化，从蒸汽转变为蒸馏水。

sentences.sentence: The device has a very simple filter to trap particles, and this can easily be shaken to remove them.
sentences.translation: 该设备有一个非常简单的过滤器用来截留颗粒物，而且这个过滤器可以很容易地通过摇晃来清除这些颗粒。

structure.text: and this can easily be shaken to remove them

difficult_points: to trap particles 是不定式短语，说明 filter 的用途。
this 指代前面的 a very simple filter。
can easily be shaken 是被动结构，说明过滤器可以被摇动。
them 指代 particles，表示摇动是为了清除颗粒物。

sentences.sentence: There are two tubes for liquid coming out: one for the waste – salt from seawater, fluoride, etc. – and another for the distilled water.
sentences.translation: 流出的液体有两根管道：一根用于排出废物——海水中的盐、氟化物等——另一根用于排出蒸馏水。

structure.text: and another for the distilled water

difficult_points: There are 是存在句，说明设备有两根管道。
for liquid coming out 修饰 tubes，说明这些管道处理流出的液体。
破折号中的 salt from seawater, fluoride, etc. 是对 the waste 的举例说明。
one ... and another ... 构成并列，对两根管道的用途进行区分。

sentences.sentence: The performance of the unit is shown on an LCD screen and transmitted to the company which provides servicing when necessary.
sentences.translation: 该装置的运行表现会显示在 LCD 屏幕上，并传送给在必要时提供维护服务的公司。

structure.text: is shown on an LCD screen

difficult_points: is shown 和 transmitted 都是被动结构，后者省略了 is。
which 引导定语从句修饰 the company，说明公司负责提供维护服务。
when necessary 是省略结构，相当于 when it is necessary。

sentences.sentence: A recent analysis found that at least two-thirds of the world's population lives with severe water scarcity for at least a month every year.
sentences.translation: 最近的一项分析发现，世界上至少三分之二的人口每年至少有一个月生活在严重缺水的环境中。

structure.text: that at least two-thirds of the world's population lives with severe water scarcity for at least a month every year
at least two-thirds of the world's population
for at least a month every year

difficult_points: found 后接 that 宾语从句，说明分析得出的结论。
at least two-thirds of the world's population 是从句主语，数量表达较长，需要整体理解。
lives with severe water scarcity 表示长期处于严重缺水状态。
for at least a month every year 说明这种缺水状态每年持续的最低时间。

sentences.sentence: Janssen says that by 2030 half of the world's population will be living with water stress – where the demand exceeds the supply over a certain period of time.
sentences.translation: Janssen 说，到 2030 年，世界上一半的人口将面临水压力——也就是在某一段时间内需求超过供给的情况。

structure.text: that by 2030 half of the world's population will be living with water stress
where the demand exceeds the supply over a certain period of time

difficult_points: that 引导 says 的宾语从句，核心预测是 half of the world's population will be living with water stress。
will be living with 使用将来进行时，强调到 2030 年会处于这种状态。
破折号后的 where 从句解释 water stress 的含义。
the demand exceeds the supply 表示需求超过供给，是水压力的定义。

expressions.meaning_zh: 到 2030 年前；到 2030 年时

expressions.text: over a certain period of time

sentences.sentence: 'It is really important that a sustainable solution is brought to the market that is able to help these people,' he says.
sentences.translation: 他说：“把一种能够帮助这些人的可持续解决方案推向市场真的非常重要。”

structure.text: that a sustainable solution is brought to the market
that is able to help these people

difficult_points: It is really important 是形式主语结构，真正的主语是后面的 that 从句。
is brought to the market 是被动语态，意思是解决方案被推向市场。
that is able to help these people 修饰 a sustainable solution，说明解决方案的作用。

sentences.sentence: Many countries 'don't have the money for desalination plants, which are very expensive to build.
sentences.translation: 许多国家“没有钱建设海水淡化厂，而这些工厂建造成本非常高。

structure.text: don't have the money for desalination plants
which are very expensive to build

difficult_points: 本句是引号内讲话的一部分，引号在下一句末尾才关闭。
have the money for 表示有资金用于某事，for 后接 desalination plants。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，修饰 desalination plants，说明其建造昂贵。

sentences.sentence: They don't have the money to operate them, they are very maintenance intensive, and they don't have the money to buy the diesel to run the desalination plants, so it is a really bad situation.'
sentences.translation: 它们没有钱运营这些工厂，这些工厂维护成本很高，而且它们也没有钱购买柴油来运行海水淡化厂，所以情况非常糟糕。”

structure.text: They don't have the money to operate them
and they don't have the money to buy the diesel to run the desalination plants
so it is a really bad situation

difficult_points: They 指代前一句的 Many countries，them 指代 desalination plants。
句中多个分句用逗号和 and 串联，层层说明缺钱带来的问题。
maintenance intensive 表示维护需求高、维护成本重。
so 引出结果，概括前面多个困难造成的糟糕局面。

sentences.sentence: The device is aimed at a wide variety of users – from homeowners in the developing world who do not have a constant supply of water to people living off the grid in rural parts of the US.
sentences.translation: 该设备面向各种各样的用户——从发展中国家没有持续供水的房主，到美国农村地区离网生活的人群。

structure.text: is aimed at a wide variety of users
from homeowners in the developing world
who do not have a constant supply of water
to people living off the grid in rural parts of the US

difficult_points: be aimed at 表示产品面向或针对某类用户。
from ... to ... 说明用户范围很广，不是实际移动。
who 引导定语从句修饰 homeowners，说明这些房主缺乏持续供水。
living off the grid 是现在分词短语，修饰 people。

expressions.meaning_zh: 离网的；不接入公共设施的

sentences.sentence: The first commercial versions of the Desolenator are expected to be in operation in India early next year, after field tests are carried out.
sentences.translation: 在完成实地测试后，首批商业版 Desolenator 预计将于明年初在印度投入运行。

structure.text: The first commercial versions of the Desolenator
are expected to be in operation in India early next year
after field tests are carried out

difficult_points: are expected to 是被动表达，表示外界预期。
be in operation 表示已经投入运行，而不是仍在开发。
after 引导时间状语从句，说明商业版本运行前要先完成实地测试。
are carried out 是被动语态，指测试被实施。

sentences.sentence: The market for the self-sufficient devices in developing countries is twofold – those who cannot afford the money for the device outright and pay through microfinance, and middle-income homes that can lease their own equipment.
sentences.translation: 在发展中国家，这种自给自足设备的市场分为两类：一类是无法一次性支付设备费用、通过小额信贷付款的人；另一类是可以租赁自己设备的中等收入家庭。

structure.text: The market for the self-sufficient devices in developing countries
those who cannot afford the money for the device outright and pay through microfinance
who cannot afford the money for the device outright and pay through microfinance
and middle-income homes that can lease their own equipment

difficult_points: twofold 表示市场分成两部分，破折号后具体列出两类用户。
those who ... 指一类人，who 从句说明他们无法一次性付款但可通过小额信贷支付。
and middle-income homes ... 是第二类市场，与 those 并列。
that can lease their own equipment 修饰 middle-income homes，说明其支付方式。

sentences.sentence: 'People in India don't pay for a fridge outright; they pay for it over six months.
sentences.translation: “印度人不会一次性支付冰箱的钱；他们会在六个月内分期付款。

structure.text: don't pay for a fridge outright
pay for it over six months

difficult_points: 本句是直接引语的开头，引号在下一句末尾才关闭。
分号连接两个并列分句，后一分句解释常见的付款方式。
it 指代 a fridge，over six months 表示付款分摊在六个月内。

sentences.sentence: They would put the Desolenator on their roof and hook it up to their municipal supply and they would get very reliable drinking water on a daily basis,' Janssen says.
sentences.translation: 他们会把 Desolenator 放在屋顶上，并把它接入市政供水系统，然后他们每天都能获得非常可靠的饮用水，”Janssen 说。

structure.text: would put the Desolenator on their roof
and hook it up to their municipal supply
and they would get very reliable drinking water on a daily basis

difficult_points: would 在这里描述设想中的用户行为和结果。
hook it up to their municipal supply 表示把设备连接到市政供水系统，it 指代 Desolenator。
两个 and 连接安装、接入和获得饮用水三个连续结果。
on a daily basis 表示每天发生，强调供水的稳定性。

sentences.sentence: In the developed world, it is aimed at niche markets where tap water is unavailable – for camping, on boats, or for the military, for instance.
sentences.translation: 在发达国家，它面向无法获得自来水的小众市场，例如露营、船上使用或军用场景。

structure.text: for camping, on boats, or for the military, for instance

difficult_points: it 指代 The device 或 Desolenator。
where 引导定语从句修饰 niche markets，说明这些市场的共同条件是没有自来水。
破折号后列举 niche markets 的具体例子。
for instance 表示前面的场景只是举例。

sentences.sentence: Prices will vary according to where it is bought.
sentences.translation: 价格会根据购买地点而有所不同。

structure.text: according to where it is bought

difficult_points: will vary 表示价格不是固定的，而会变化。
according to 后接 where 引导的从句，说明价格变化依据购买地点。
it 指代该设备，is bought 是被动语态。

sentences.sentence: In the developing world, the price will depend on what deal aid organisations can negotiate.
sentences.translation: 在发展中国家，价格将取决于援助组织能够谈成什么样的交易。

structure.text: will depend on what deal aid organisations can negotiate
what deal aid organisations can negotiate

difficult_points: In the developing world 限定价格机制适用的地区。
depend on 后接 what 引导的宾语从句，说明价格取决于谈判结果。
aid organisations 是 negotiate 的主语，can negotiate 表示能够协商出的交易。

sentences.sentence: In developed countries, it is likely to come in at $1,000 (£685) a unit, said Janssen.
sentences.translation: Janssen 表示，在发达国家，它的价格很可能达到每台 1,000 美元（685 英镑）。

structure.text: is likely to come in at $1,000 (£685) a unit

difficult_points: it 指代 Desolenator 设备。
is likely to 表示可能性较高，但不是绝对确定。
come in at 在价格语境中表示“达到某一价格”。
a unit 表示每台设备的单价。

sentences.sentence: 'We are a venture with a social mission.
sentences.translation: “我们是一家带有社会使命的创业企业。
difficult_points: 本句是直接引语的开头，引号在 F-06 句末关闭。
venture 指创业公司或商业项目，不是普通的“冒险”。
with a social mission 修饰 venture，说明公司不只追求商业目标。

sentences.sentence: We are aware that the product we have envisioned is mainly finding application in the developing world and humanitarian sector and that this is the way we will proceed.
sentences.translation: 我们清楚，我们设想的产品主要会在发展中国家和人道主义领域得到应用，而且这也是我们将继续推进的方向。

structure.text: that the product we have envisioned is mainly finding application in the developing world and humanitarian sector
and that this is the way we will proceed

difficult_points: are aware 后接两个并列的 that 从句，说明公司认识到的两件事。
we have envisioned 是省略关系代词的定语从句，修饰 the product。
is mainly finding application 表示产品主要被用于某些领域。
the way we will proceed 中 we will proceed 修饰 the way，说明未来推进路径。

sentences.sentence: We do realise, though, that to be a viable company there is a bottom line to keep in mind,' he says.
sentences.translation: 不过，我们确实意识到，要成为一家可持续经营的公司，还必须把底线利益放在心上，”他说。

structure.text: that to be a viable company there is a bottom line to keep in mind

difficult_points: do realise 中 do 起强调作用，表示“确实意识到”。
though 是插入语，表示让步或转折，相当于“不过”。
to be a viable company 是目的或条件色彩的不定式短语。
there is a bottom line to keep in mind 表示仍有商业底线需要考虑。

sentences.sentence: The company itself is based at Imperial College London, although Janssen, its chief executive, still lives in the UAE.
sentences.translation: 公司本身设在伦敦帝国理工学院，不过其首席执行官 Janssen 仍住在阿联酋。

structure.text: is based at Imperial College London
although Janssen, its chief executive, still lives in the UAE

difficult_points: itself 强调公司所在地，与 Janssen 本人所在地形成对比。
although 引导让步状语从句，说明公司在伦敦而 CEO 仍住在阿联酋。
its chief executive 是 Janssen 的同位语，补充说明身份。

sentences.sentence: It has raised £340,000 in funding so far.
sentences.translation: 到目前为止，它已经筹集了 34 万英镑的资金。
difficult_points: It 指代 the company。
has raised 使用现在完成时，强调筹资结果延续到现在。
in funding 指筹集的是资金而非销售收入。
so far 表示截至目前，暗示未来可能继续筹资。

sentences.sentence: Within two years, he says, the company aims to be selling 1,000 units a month, mainly in the humanitarian field.
sentences.translation: 他说，公司目标是在两年内达到每月销售 1,000 台，主要面向人道主义领域。

structure.text: aims to be selling 1,000 units a month

difficult_points: Within two years 表示目标实现的时间范围。
he says 是插入的报道分句，不影响主句 the company aims。
aims to be selling 表示目标是达到持续销售的状态。
1,000 units a month 中 a month 表示每月的销售频率。

sentences.sentence: They are expected to be sold in areas such as Australia, northern Chile, Peru, Texas and California.
sentences.translation: 预计这些设备将在澳大利亚、智利北部、秘鲁、得克萨斯和加利福尼亚等地区销售。

structure.text: are expected to be sold in areas
such as Australia, northern Chile, Peru, Texas and California

difficult_points: They 指代前一句中的 units，即设备。
are expected to be sold 是双重被动色彩的结构，表示预计将被销售。
such as 后列举销售地区，是 areas 的具体例子。

expressions.text: be sold in areas such as
